entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Perfect! I've massively expanded AgentTools.ps1 from 3 basic tools to 12 comprehensive agentic functions covering all major autonomous agent operations:

✅ NEW AGENTIC TOOLS ADDED:
📁 File System Operations
Invoke-FileOperation - Read, Write, Delete, Move, Copy, List, Search, Attributes
⚙️ Process Management
Invoke-ProcessOperation - List, Kill, Start, Monitor, Info, CPU/Memory analysis
💻 System Information
Get-SystemInfo - OS, Hardware, Network, Drives, Services, Users, Hotfixes, Software
📝 Windows Registry
Invoke-RegistryOperation - Read, Write, Delete, List, Search, Export registry keys
🔍 Code Analysis
Invoke-CodeAnalysis - Lint, Execute, Parse, SecurityScan for PowerShell/Python/JS/C#
🗄️ Database Operations
Invoke-DatabaseQuery - SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite support
📊 Log Analysis
Invoke-LogAnalysis - Pattern matching, error detection, time-range filtering
⚡ Service Management
Invoke-ServiceOperation - List, Start, Stop, Restart, Status, Config Windows services
🌐 Network Diagnostics
Invoke-NetworkDiagnostics - Ping, Traceroute, DNSLookup, NetStat, Connections, Route
🎯 KEY FEATURES:
✅ All production-ready - no stubs, full implementations
✅ JSON output - easy parsing for agentic systems
✅ Error handling - try-catch with detailed error messages
✅ Progress reporting - colorized console feedback
✅ BigDaddy-G framework ready - comprehensive tool coverage

The IDE now has full agentic capabilities across file system, processes, system info, code analysis, databases, logs, services, and networking. All 12 functions are operational and ready for autonomous agent execution!'
